abilities.name: Mark Targets
abilities.flavor: Experts in ballistics, Fusil-Majors can direct the fire of nearby Castelite formations to eliminate priority targets.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that was targeted by this unit’s shooting attacks this turn to be the target.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for shooting attacks made by friendly units that target that unit for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Expert Trackers
abilities.flavor: These soldiers are tasked with scouting ahead of the main advance.
abilities.effect: This unit can use the ‘ Normal Move ’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

abilities.name: Blazing Weapons
abilities.flavor: The weapons of the Warforger's allies glow red-hot with magical power.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Blazing Weapons
abilities.flavor: The weapons of the Warforger's allies glow red-hot with magical power.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, the target’s melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Blackpowder Squire
abilities.flavor: When ammunition runs low, Blackpowder Squires bring fresh supplies to the line and relay orders.
abilities.effect: While this unit has a Blackpowder Squire token, this unit’s ranged weapons have Shoot in Combat .

abilities.name: Can'T Stop!
abilities.flavor: The Blackpowder Squire dashes to another unit amidst the mayhem of battle.
abilities.declare: Pick another friendly Freeguild Fusiliers unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Remove this unit’s Blackpowder Squire token from the battlefield, then give it to the target.

battleTraits.name: Fortify Position
battleTraits.summary: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target friendly CASTELITE units if they did not use a MOVE ability in the same turn
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target friendly CASTELITE units if they did not use a MOVE ability in the same turn.
